nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change handling

enhancements.name: WIP status
enhancements.disabled: false removes WIP counts, limit signal, and status accessibility output while limits still reject unsafe moves

enhancements.name: mobile list alternative
enhancements.disabled: false removes the view controls, list state, pressed semantics, and presentation events

enhancements.name: move announcements
enhancements.disabled: false removes the live region and every announcement update

enhancements.name: undo
enhancements.disabled: false removes snapshots, Undo UI, undo callback events, and announcement output

enhancements.name: server persistence
enhancements.disabled: false removes pending state, persistence calls, retry UI, rollback, and server errors

enhancements.name: bounded virtualization
enhancements.disabled: false renders every card and removes spacers, range controls, and window events
